title: Any Previous Podio Users find a good alternative to the Workspaces?
excerpt: I previously used Podio and although I am happy with most things I truly missed the way the workspace homepage could be set up.  I know My Work is similar, but it is not as customizable as Podio’s Workspace Homepages. An…

posts.author: jamiecrippin (Jamie Crippin)
posts.cookedHtml: I previously used Podio and although I am happy with most things I truly missed the way the workspace homepage could be set up. I know My Work is similar, but it is not as customizable as Podio’s Workspace Homepages. Anyone come up with a comparable alternative in Monday?
